---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Why is it needed?

## Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed solution. Be specific.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches have you thought about? Why are they less suitable?

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, mockups, or references to similar features in other projects.
